---
title: "Photography"
subtitle: "Photos of any and everything"
---

Placeholders for now. Drop your real images into `assets/photos/` and
swap the filenames below (jpg or png both work).

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](../assets/photos/photo1.svg){group="gallery"}

![](../assets/photos/photo2.svg){group="gallery"}

![](../assets/photos/photo3.svg){group="gallery"}
:::
